title: `abad #5648
definition:
1) to make, do
    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to make, create
        1a2) to do, perform
    1b) (Ithp'al)
        1b1) to be made into
        1b2) to be done, be wrought, be performed, be executed, be
             carried out
